overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban alley at night, featuring neon-lit traditional architecture, police vehicles, and street food vendors. The footage showcases high-quality game engine graphics with vibrant teal and pink neon lighting typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with traditional gate

events.description: passes under traditional gate structure into covered neon-lit walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway with metal grate flooring

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style gate structure with green neon accent lighting
cylindrical red paper lanterns with white patterns hanging from gate structure
horizontal teal neon light strips illuminating the walkway ceiling
metal grate walkway flooring with green neon reflection
futuristic vending machines with glowing displays flanking the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance of a covered walkway featuring a traditional gate with red paper lanterns and teal neon lighting. The camera moves forward over metal grate flooring, passing futuristic vending machines on either side, establishing the cyberpunk aesthetic blending traditional and futuristic elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: holotheater building exterior with neon signage

events.description: exits covered walkway into open alley with holotheater building facade
camera tilts upward to reveal upper floors and overhead walkway

agents.ego_description: walking forward then looking up at the multi-story building facade

entered.detail: tall concrete building with barred windows and green neon signage reading HOLOTHEATER
large circular neon sign with skull graphic and pink-green lighting
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with glass railing
string of red paper lanterns hanging along building balcony

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to reveal the Holotheater building with its distinctive barred windows and vibrant neon skull signage. The camera tilts upward to show an overhead pedestrian walkway and strings of red lanterns, emphasizing the vertical density of the cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with police vehicles and outdoor seating

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with parked police vehicles
approaches group of people sitting at plastic table near biohazard truck

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza toward outdoor seating area with card players

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked with glowing teal side panels displaying POLICE
two individuals sitting at plastic table playing cards

entered.detail: futuristic police sedan with teal neon side panels and NCPD markings
large black truck with yellow biohazard symbol and pink neon lighting
large industrial ventilation fans mounted on wall
metal staircase with red railings leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open plaza featuring an NCPD police car and a biohazard truck parked near outdoor seating. Large ventilation fans and a metal staircase are visible in the background. The camera approaches two individuals playing cards at a plastic table, establishing a lived-in street atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall area with card players

events.description: circles around card players showing their game from multiple angles
biohazard truck temporarily blocks view as camera passes

agents.ego_description: circling around card players to observe their game before approaching food stall

notable_agents.action: woman in tank top leaning over table playing cards
man in cap holding cards and smoking

entered.detail: long service counter with glowing teal menu displays and food preparation area
illuminated counter displays showing food items with teal and orange lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the street food area, the camera circles around two individuals engaged in a card game at a plastic table. The biohazard truck looms nearby as the camera approaches the food stall counter, revealing glowing menu displays and a vendor working behind the service area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior with service counter

events.description: moves behind food stall counter revealing preparation equipment
exits food stall back to street plaza with police car

agents.ego_description: moving through food stall service area then exiting back to street

notable_agents.action: vendor in yellow hard hat and reflective vest working at food counter

entered.detail: futuristic cooking appliances and food storage units with red and teal lighting
tall white refrigerator with glass door in corner of stall
red neon sign reading BURRITO STAND above food dispensers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves behind the food stall counter, revealing futuristic cooking equipment and a vendor in a hard hat preparing food. After observing the service area, the camera exits back to the street, passing the police car once more and revealing a burrito stand sign before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered traditional walkway into a bustling, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by gliding over metal grate flooring beneath a gate adorned with red lanterns and teal neon, passing futuristic vending machines that blend ancient and modern aesthetics. As the camera exits the covered area, the view opens to reveal the Holotheater building with its glowing skull signage and an overhead pedestrian walkway, before shifting toward an open plaza occupied by an NCPD police car and a biohazard truck. The movement then flows toward a lived-in street scene, circling two individuals playing cards at a plastic table before approaching a food stall with glowing menu displays. Finally, the camera pushes behind the counter to reveal a vendor in a hard hat and futuristic cooking equipment, before retreating back into the street past the police car and a burrito stand sign.
